subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, and the utmost sorrow was felt on account of the state of disorder in thy affairs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مکتوب شما واصل و از پریشانی امور شما نهایت احزان حاصل شد ولی
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @Hands of the Cause, @suffering and imprisonment, @poems and quotation from poetry, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
